privileged_info_summary: The task metadata is fully verified and accurate. The library contains exactly 18 papers (10 classic + 8 ML papers). The 4 target papers (Attention Is All You Need [2017], Language Models are Few-Shot Learners [2020], ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks [2012], and Generative Adversarial Nets [2014]) are correctly identified as the only papers with publication venue 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems' in the ML_PAPERS dataset. The collection name 'NeurIPS Preparation', tag name 'neurips-reading', and minimum note length of 150 characters are all properly defined and used consistently throughout the task implementation.
